resources.title: Claude API 첫 호출
resources.description: Google Colab에서 anthropic 패키지를 설치하고 API 키를 설정해 첫 번째 Claude API 호출을 완성하는 실습
resources.command: pip install anthropic && python -c "import anthropic; client = anthropic.Anthropic(api_key='your-key'); print(client.messages.create(model='claude-sonnet-4-5', max_tokens=100, messages=[{'role':'user','content':'안녕!'}]).content[0].text)"

resources.title: 스트리밍 챗봇 만들기
resources.description: Claude API의 스트리밍 기능을 활용해 터미널에서 대화할 수 있는 간단한 챗봇 Python 스크립트 작성
resources.command: claude '스트리밍을 지원하는 Claude API 챗봇 Python 코드를 작성해줘. 대화 히스토리 유지, 종료는 quit 입력'

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of the Python + AI course?
options: To teach advanced machine learning algorithms
To provide a practical introduction to Python for AI development
To explore hardware requirements for AI applications
To focus solely on data visualization techniques
quiz.explanation: The course aims to provide a practical introduction to Python specifically for AI development.

quiz.question: Which environment allows you to run Python directly in the browser?
quiz.explanation: Google Colab is a free environment that allows users to run Python directly in the browser.

quiz.question: What functionality does the Claude API offer for chatbot development?
quiz.explanation: The Claude API provides streaming conversation capabilities, which can be utilized in chatbot development.

practicePrompts.label: Call Claude API
practicePrompts.instruction: Write a Python function to call the Claude API.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a Python function that sends a request to the Claude API and prints the response.
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the function to handle errors and print a user-friendly message.

practicePrompts.label: OpenAI Library Usage
practicePrompts.instruction: Use the OpenAI Python library to generate text.
practicePrompts.prompt: Write a script that uses the OpenAI library to generate a short story based on a given prompt.
practicePrompts.followUp: Change the prompt and observe how the story changes with different inputs.

practicePrompts.label: Build a Simple Chatbot
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a simple chatbot using Claude API's streaming feature.
practicePrompts.prompt: Write a Python script that uses the Claude API to create a chatbot that can respond to user queries in real-time.
practicePrompts.followUp: Enhance the chatbot by adding a command to terminate the conversation gracefully.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.
evaluation.context: This learning topic is "Python + AI 기초". 파이썬 기초부터 OpenAI·Anthropic API 연동까지, AI 개발을 위한 Python 입문 실전 과정
successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
The learner can explain or verify what happened
commonMistakes: Only reading the lesson without trying the practice step
Posting an incomplete command or partial result
Confusing setup issues with the lesson outcome
